response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, craftsmanship-oriented senior engineer with ~15 years of experience, solid testing discipline, and some high-throughput systems work (Sociomantic's data integration handling millions of requests per second). However, the role is a Principal/IC6 position centered on experimentation platforms, telemetry foundations, feature flighting, and statistical analysis at enterprise scale — areas where the resume shows essentially no direct experience. There is also little evidence of principal-level scope: leading multi-workstream initiatives, architecting systems adopted across many teams, or cross-org technical leadership. Strong senior IC profile, but a poor fit for this specific charter.
strengths: 15+ years of broad, polyglot engineering experience (TypeScript/Node, D, C/C++, Java) with strong testing/TDD craftsmanship
Experience with high-throughput, low-latency distributed services (millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Recent hands-on AI tooling work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) matching the AI-first emphasis
concerns: No experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flagging, or growth-measurement platform experience — the core of the role
No demonstrated telemetry/metrics infrastructure or statistical analysis background
No evidence of principal-level scope: multi-team initiatives, platform adoption across orgs, or mentoring/leading engineers at scale

key_factors.factor: Lacks principal-level cross-team leadership track record
Strong engineering fundamentals and scale experience
